case_title: EDMUND WONG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, EDMUND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,780.78 FILED BY WONG, EDMUND AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-08-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLANTIFF EDMUND WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
